title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in tankers this week, it has been reported that clients of Sea Pioneer ordered two firm plus two optional 50k dwt MRs at K SB, with the firm vessels expected to deliver in 4Q 2025. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
